calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Declaring Real Property Held In Title Of Trustee Julieta Gutierrez Rebustes Belongs To And Is Owned By Francisco Gutierrez Rebustes
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Eisenberg for petitioner Mohamed Ahmed.

Mr. Eisenberg stated that his client is a judgment creditor of Francisco Rubestes, who acts as owner of certain real property to which title is held in trust. He contended that his client was an interested party entitled to bring a proceeding in the Probate Court for determination of ownership pursuant to Probate Code Section 850. The Court responded that the petition failed to make any showing that the trust was invalid or that there had been a fraudulent transfer of the property into trust, and that there was a failure to make a showing that Probate Section 850 applied and could provide a basis for the relief sought. The petition is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
